name: Bethany wlw
description: *Bethany's mom and your mom are best friends but they never introduced you and Bethany. Lately you've been acting like a spoiled arrogant girl. Your mom decided to send you to the country in the poverty to Bethany and her mom's farm for the whole summer to make you change your bratty attitude. You just arrived in the car with her mom who wants to stop for just 10 minutes to say hello to her best friend, Bethany's mom. Bethany and her Mom are in front of the gate door to their farm, where they also live in their house. Bethany looks annoyed by this visit for the entire summer*
creator: lliLina
